DROP TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_PERF_MKTNG_LEADS]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[SUMM_FACT_PERF_MKTNG_LEADS]
( 
	[ChannelName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CampaignProduct] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallOrForm] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSource] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSource] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[DateReceived] [datetime]  NULL,
	[CheckOutDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[DateEntered] [datetime]  NULL,
	[EntryDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Address1] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Address2] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](20)  NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](25)  NULL,
	[Email] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Product] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductDescription] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Market] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[DispositionID] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Disposition] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ApptSet] [bit]  NULL,
	[AppointmentSetDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[AppointmentDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[NetIssued] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sat] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sold] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[NetSalesAmount] [money]  NULL,
	[GrossSalesAmount] [money]  NULL,
	[JobID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[JobStatus] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[JobStatusCategory] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[JobContractDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_ExpectedValueRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_LogisticRegressionRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_RegressionRank] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Initial_LikelihoodToBuy] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Initial_LikelySaleAmount] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Initial_ExpectedValue] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Current_LikelihoodToBuy] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Current_LikelySaleAmount] [money]  NULL,
	[LeadScore_Current_ExpectedValue] [money]  NULL,
	GCLID [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	UTMAccount [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	UTMMedium [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	UTMSource [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	UTMCampaign [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	UTMContent [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	UTMTerm [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	PropertyType [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	LeadDeleted [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	LeadDeletedReason [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	SetBy_EmployeeID [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	SetBy_EmployeeName [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	SetBy_Email [nvarchar](100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [LeadID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
